name: Process Flow — Grant Application Pipeline (10 steps)
input: Create a process flow for grant application: Identify Funding → Review Guidelines → Develop Aims → Write Budget → Institutional Review → Submit LOI → Full Proposal → External Review → Award Notification → Post-Award Setup.
qualityCriteria: Arrows between steps implied by process flow
No placeholder or lorem ipsum content
napkinBenchmark: 10-step process flow showing complete grant application lifecycle.

data.title: Grant Application Pipeline

items.label: Identify Funding
items.description: Search NIH Reporter, NSF, foundations for opportunities

items.label: Develop Aims
items.description: Draft specific aims with hypothesis and significance

items.label: Institutional Review
items.description: Internal review by grants office and department

items.label: Submit LOI
items.description: Letter of intent if required by funder

items.label: Full Proposal
items.description: Complete research plan with all required sections

items.label: External Review
items.description: Peer review by study section or review panel

items.label: Award Notification
items.description: Receive funding decision and award terms

items.label: Post-Award Setup
items.description: Establish accounts, hire staff, begin research

data.caption: End-to-end grant application process from funding identification to project launch
